Inline formatting context

A paragraph mixes bold and italic fragments and still flows as one line when the viewport is wide enough. When the window narrows, words wrap at the content-box edge instead of each inline element starting a new line.

Links like this link and inline snippets of code flow the same way: every word becomes a fragment on the current line box, with per-inline color and weight preserved.

Try resizing the window — the same paragraph re-flows at the new width without reloading.
